ado-status-update.prompt:
Run ADO autopilot LIVE for both meeting-join and meeting-notes areas. Note the current time as the job start time. Steps: (1) cd Q:/src/hackathon/ado-autopilot/ (2) git pull to get latest code (3) Validate configs exist and are valid JSON (4) python src/main.py update-status --config configs/meeting-join.json --auto-approve (5) python src/main.py update-status --config configs/meeting-notes.json --auto-approve. This will generate reports AND write approved updates to ADO. Copy the newly generated HTML reports from reports/ folder to Q:/src/personal_projects/virtual-office/output/scrum-master/. The tool generates files named meeting-join-report-YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS.html and meeting-notes-report-YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS.html -- copy them preserving their original filenames, and also copy each as meeting-join-latest.html and meeting-notes-latest.html respectively. After reports are saved, run the comparison script: python Q:/src/personal_projects/virtual-office/runner/Compare-Runs.py. Open the comparison summary and both reports in Edge after completion. When generating the sprint progress HTML report, include a standard VO subtitle immediately below the main title:

Agent: Scrum Master | Job: ado-status-update | Start: | Complete:

.
ado-status-update.description: Runs ADO autopilot status tweet update (live) for Meeting Join and Meeting Notes areas

bug-autopilot-meeting-join.prompt:
Run bug-autopilot LIVE for Meeting Join area bugs. Note the current time as the job start time. Steps: (1) cd Q:/src/hackathon/bug-autopilot/ (2) git pull to get latest code (3) Validate configs exist and are valid JSON (4) pip install -r requirements.txt --quiet (5) Run: powershell.exe -File bugautopilot.ps1 -Once (6) Copy the newly generated HTML report from reports/ (named run-YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS.html) to Q:/src/personal_projects/virtual-office/output/scrum-master/ preserving its original filename, and also copy it as bug-autopilot-latest.html (7) Run the comparison script: python Q:/src/personal_projects/virtual-office/runner/Compare-Runs.py (8) Open the report in Edge. When generating the sprint progress HTML report, include a standard VO subtitle immediately below the main title:

Agent: Scrum Master | Job: bug-autopilot-meeting-join | Start: | Complete:

.
bug-autopilot-meeting-join.description: Runs bug-autopilot live for Meeting Join bugs

ado-burndown-update.prompt:
Run ADO autopilot burndown LIVE for both meeting-join and meeting-notes areas. Note the current time as the job start time. Steps: (1) cd Q:/src/hackathon/ado-autopilot/ (2) git pull to get latest code (3) Validate configs exist and are valid JSON (4) python src/main.py update-burndown --config configs/meeting-join.json --auto-approve (5) python src/main.py update-burndown --config configs/meeting-notes.json --auto-approve. This will generate reports AND write approved burndown updates to ADO. Copy the newly generated HTML reports from reports/ folder to Q:/src/personal_projects/virtual-office/output/scrum-master/. Preserve original filenames and also copy each as burndown-meeting-join-latest.html and burndown-meeting-notes-latest.html respectively. Open both reports in Edge after completion. When generating any HTML report, include a standard VO subtitle immediately below the main title:

Agent: Scrum Master | Job: ado-burndown-update | Start: | Complete:

.
ado-burndown-update.description: Runs ADO autopilot burndown update (live) for Meeting Join and Meeting Notes areas

Steps: (1) cd Q:/src/hackathon/bug-autopilot/ (2) git pull to get latest code (3) Validate configs exist and are valid JSON (4) pip install -r requirements.txt --quiet (5) Run: powershell.exe -File bugautopilot.ps1 -Config Q:/src/hackathon/bug-autopilot/configs/meeting-notes.json -Once (6) Copy the newly generated HTML report from reports/ (named run-YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS.html) to Q:/src/personal_projects/virtual-office/output/scrum-master/ preserving its original filename, and also copy it as bug-autopilot-notes-latest.html (7) Run the comparison script: python Q:/src/personal_projects/virtual-office/runner/Compare-Runs.py (8) Open the report in Edge. When generating any HTML report, include a standard VO subtitle immediately below the main title:

Agent: Scrum Master | Job: bug-autopilot-notes | Start: | Complete:

.
bug-autopilot-notes.description: Runs bug-autopilot live for Meeting Notes bugs
